name: ENV
subtitle: Digital ADSR Envelope Generator
summary: An 8 HP digital ADSR envelope generator with six control stages (Attack, Decay, Sustain, Release, Time, and output Level), two simultaneous envelope outputs, separate Gate and Trigger inputs, and selectable Linear/Exponential response. A three-way mode switch enables single-pass, Gated looping, or free-running Loop mode. A Punch switch adds transient snap to the attack. In Loop mode the output becomes an audio-rate LFO.
